processing.text:
declare @q nvarchar(4000), @s varchar(8000), @field varchar(32), @wsID varchar(1), @baseCurrency char(3) declare @user int, @admin bit, @r int, @i int, @c1 int, @c2 int, @currentID int, @count int, @voucherID varchar(8), @id char(13)
select @wsID = rtrim(val) from options where rtrim(name) = 'm_ws_id' select @baseCurrency = upper(rtrim(val)) from options where rtrim(name) = 'm_ma_nt0' select @i = 1, @admin = @@admin, @user = @@userID, @voucherID = 'DM1'
-- Update update @@table set dvt_sp = b.dvt from @@table a join dmvt b on a.ma_sp = b.ma_vt where a.dvt_sp = '' update @@table set dvt = b.dvt from @@table a join dmvt b on a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt where a.dvt = ''
-- Check select @field = 'ma_sp', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_sp not in (select ma_vt from vdmsp)&Error; select @field = 'dvt_sp', @r = min(stt) from @@table a left join vdmvtqddvt b on a.dvt_sp = b.dvt and (a.ma_sp = b.ma_vt or b.ma_vt = '*') left join dmvt c on a.ma_sp = c.ma_vt and a.dvt_sp = c.dvt where b.dvt is null and c.dvt is null&Error; select @field = 'ma_bp', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_bp <> '' and ma_bp not in (select ma_bp from dmbp)&Error;
select @field = 'ma_vt', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_vt not in (select ma_vt from dmvt)&Error; select @field = 'dvt', @r = min(stt) from @@table a left join vdmvtqddvt b on a.dvt = b.dvt and (a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt or b.ma_vt = '*') left join dmvt c on a.ma_vt = c.ma_vt and a.dvt = c.dvt where b.dvt is null and c.dvt is null&Error;
if @admin <> 1 begin if @type = '1' begin if @@sysDatabaseName.dbo.MaxvOnline$System$GetAuthorize(@admin, @user, 'BMTran', 'Edit') = 0 select @type = '0' end end
if @type = '0' delete @@table from @@table a where exists(select 1 from phdm b where a.ma_sp = b.ma_sp) select a.* into #k from @@table a join phdm b on a.ma_sp = b.ma_sp delete @@table from @@table a where exists(select 1 from #k b where a.ma_sp = b.ma_sp)
select @count = count(*) from @@table
if @count > 0 begin create table #id1(stt_rec char(13), ma_sp varchar(32), stt int, id int identity(1, 1)) insert into #id1(ma_sp, stt) select ma_sp, min(stt) from @@table group by ma_sp
select @c1 = count(*) from #id1 select @c2 = 1, @id = '', @s = '', @currentID = stt_rec from dmstt
update dmstt set stt_rec = stt_rec + @count update #id1 set stt_rec = @wsID + replace(str(id + rtrim(@currentID) , 9), ' ', '0') + @voucherID
create table #d1(stt_rec char(13), stt_rec0 char(3), line_nbr int, ma_vt varchar(32), dvt nvarchar(32), nhieu_dvt bit, he_so numeric(24, 12), so_luong numeric(16, 3), tl_hh numeric(24, 12), ngay_ct1 smalldatetime, ngay_ct2 smalldatetime, tg_th int, tl_pb numeric(24, 12), dien_giai nvarchar(256))
insert into #d1 select b.stt_rec, replace(str((a.stt - b.stt) + 1, 3), ' ', '0'), (a.stt - b.stt) + 1, a.ma_vt, a.dvt, c.nhieu_dvt, 1, a.so_luong, a.tl_hh, a.ngay_hl_tu, a.ngay_hl_den, a.tg_th, a.tl_pb, a.dien_giai from @@table a join #id1 b on a.ma_sp = b.ma_sp left join dmvt c on a.ma_vt = c.ma_vt order by a.ma_sp, a.stt
update #d1 set he_so = b.he_so from #d1 a join vdmvtqddvt b on (a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt or b.ma_vt = '*') and a.dvt = b.dvt where a.nhieu_dvt = 1
create table #m1(stt_rec char(13), ma_sp char(32), dvt_sp nvarchar(32), nhieu_dvt bit, he_so numeric(24, 12), ma_bp char(32), t_so_luong numeric(16, 3)) insert into #m1 select b.stt_rec, a.ma_sp, a.dvt_sp, c.nhieu_dvt, 1, a.ma_bp, 0 from @@table a join #id1 b on a.stt = b.stt join dmvt c on a.ma_sp = c.ma_vt
update #m1 set t_so_luong = b.t_so_luong from #m1 a join (select stt_rec, sum(so_luong) as t_so_luong from #d1 group by stt_rec) b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec update #m1 set he_so = b.he_so from #m1 a join vdmvtqddvt b on (a.ma_sp = b.ma_vt or b.ma_vt = '*') and a.dvt_sp = b.dvt where a.nhieu_dvt = 1
create table #i1(stt_rec char(13), ngay_ct smalldatetime, so_ct char(12), ma_dvcs varchar(32), c$ varchar(8000), m$ varchar(8000), d$ varchar(8000), ma_sp varchar(32), stt int, id int identity(1, 1)) insert into #i1 select a.stt_rec, null, '', '', a.ma_sp + a.stt_rec, '#10$' + a.ma_sp + '#20$' + b.ma_bp, '', a.ma_sp, a.stt from #id1 a join @@table b on a.stt = b.stt
while @c1 >= @c2 begin select @id = stt_rec from #i1 where id = @c2 select @s = @s + '#10$' + rtrim(isnull(ma_vt, '')) from #d1 where stt_rec = @id update #i1 set d$ = @s where stt_rec = @id select @s = '', @c2 = @c2 + 1 end
-- Insert insert into phdm(stt_rec, ma_ct, loai_ct, ma_gd, ma_nt, ty_gia, t_so_luong, t_tien_nt, t_tien, ma_sp, so_luong, dvt, he_so, ma_bp, loai_dm, stt_rec_sx, status, datetime0, datetime2, user_id0, user_id2, fcode1, fcode2, fcode3, fdate1, fdate2, fdate3, fqty1, fqty2, fqty3, fnote1, fnote2, fnote3, s1, s2, s3, s4, s5, s6, s7, s8, s9) select stt_rec, @voucherID, '', '', @baseCurrency, 1, t_so_luong, 0, 0, ma_sp, 0, dvt_sp, he_so, ma_bp, 0, '', '1', getdate(), getdate(), @user, @user, '', '', '', null, null, null, 0, 0, 0, '', '', '', '', '', '', 0, 0, 0, null, null, null from #m1
insert into ctdm(stt_rec, stt_rec0, ma_ct, ma_vt, dvt, he_so, so_luong, gia_nt, gia, tien_nt, tien, tl_hh, ngay_ct1, ngay_ct2, tg_th, tl_pb, sl_dh, sl_tt, ma_tc1, ma_tc2, ma_tc3, dien_giai, line_nbr, ma_td1, ma_td2, ma_td3, sl_td1, sl_td2, sl_td3, ngay_td1, ngay_td2, ngay_td3, gc_td1, gc_td2, gc_td3, s1, s2, s3, s4, s5, s6, s7, s8, s9) select stt_rec, stt_rec0, @voucherID, ma_vt, dvt, he_so, so_luong, 0, 0, 0, 0, tl_hh, ngay_ct1, ngay_ct2, tg_th, tl_pb, 0, 0, null, null, null, dien_giai, line_nbr, '', '', '', 0, 0, 0, null, null, null, '', '', '', '', '', '', 0, 0, 0, null, null, null from #d1
insert into idm select stt_rec, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_dvcs, '1', @user, c$, m$, d$, ma_sp from #i1 end
if @type = '1' begin select @id = '', @s = '', @c2 = 1, @c1 = count(*) from #k
if @c1 > 0 begin create table #id2(stt_rec char(13), ma_sp varchar(32), stt int, id int identity(1, 1)) insert into #id2 select b.stt_rec, a.ma_sp, min(a.stt) from #k a join phdm b on a.ma_sp = b.ma_sp group by a.ma_sp, b.stt_rec
create table #d2(stt_rec char(13), stt_rec0 char(3), line_nbr int, ma_vt varchar(32), dvt varchar(32), nhieu_dvt bit, he_so numeric(24, 12), so_luong numeric(16, 3), tl_hh numeric(24, 12), ngay_ct1 smalldatetime, ngay_ct2 smalldatetime, tg_th int, tl_pb numeric(24, 12), dien_giai nvarchar(256))
insert into #d2 select b.stt_rec, replace(str((a.stt - b.stt) + 1, 3), ' ', '0'), (a.stt - b.stt) + 1, a.ma_vt, a.dvt, c.nhieu_dvt, 1, a.so_luong, a.tl_hh, a.ngay_hl_tu, a.ngay_hl_den, a.tg_th, a.tl_pb, a.dien_giai from #k a join #id2 b on a.ma_sp = b.ma_sp left join dmvt c on a.ma_vt = c.ma_vt order by a.ma_sp, a.stt
update #d2 set he_so = b.he_so from #d2 a join vdmvtqddvt b on (a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt or b.ma_vt = '*') and a.dvt = b.dvt where a.nhieu_dvt = 1
create table #m2(stt_rec char(13), ma_sp varchar(32), dvt_sp nvarchar(32), nhieu_dvt bit, he_so numeric(24, 12), ma_bp varchar(32), t_so_luong numeric(16, 3)) insert into #m2 select b.stt_rec, a.ma_sp, a.dvt_sp, c.nhieu_dvt, 1, a.ma_bp, 0 from #k a join #id2 b on a.stt = b.stt join dmvt c on a.ma_sp = b.ma_sp
update #m2 set t_so_luong = b.t_so_luong from #m2 a join (select stt_rec, sum(so_luong) as t_so_luong from #d2 group by stt_rec) b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec update #m2 set he_so = b.he_so from #m2 a join vdmvtqddvt b on (a.ma_sp = b.ma_vt or b.ma_vt = '*') and a.dvt_sp = b.dvt where a.nhieu_dvt = 1
create table #i2(stt_rec char(13), ngay_ct smalldatetime, so_ct char(12), ma_dvcs varchar(32), c$ varchar(8000), m$ varchar(8000), d$ varchar(8000), ma_sp varchar(32), stt int, id int identity(1, 1)) insert into #i2 select a.stt_rec, null, '', '', a.ma_sp + a.stt_rec, '#10$' + a.ma_sp + '#20$' + b.ma_bp, '', a.ma_sp, a.stt from #id2 a join #k b on a.stt = b.stt
while @c1 >= @c2 begin select @id = stt_rec from #i2 where id = @c2 select @s = @s + '#10$' + rtrim(isnull(ma_vt, '')) from #d2 where stt_rec = @id update #i2 set d$ = @s where stt_rec = @id select @s = '', @c2 = @c2 + 1 end
-- Update update phdm set ma_sp = b.ma_sp, dvt = b.dvt_sp, he_so = b.he_so, ma_bp = b.ma_bp, t_so_luong = b.t_so_luong from phdm a join #m2 b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec
delete ctdm where stt_rec in (select distinct stt_rec from #id2) insert into ctdm(stt_rec, stt_rec0, ma_ct, ma_vt, dvt, he_so, so_luong, gia_nt, gia, tien_nt, tien, tl_hh, ngay_ct1, ngay_ct2, tg_th, tl_pb, sl_dh, sl_tt, ma_tc1, ma_tc2, ma_tc3, dien_giai, line_nbr, ma_td1, ma_td2, ma_td3, sl_td1, sl_td2, sl_td3, ngay_td1, ngay_td2, ngay_td3, gc_td1, gc_td2, gc_td3, s1, s2, s3, s4, s5, s6, s7, s8, s9) select stt_rec, stt_rec0, @voucherID, ma_vt, dvt, he_so, so_luong, 0, 0, 0, 0, tl_hh, ngay_ct1, ngay_ct2, tg_th, tl_pb, 0, 0, null, null, null, dien_giai, line_nbr, '', '', '', 0, 0, 0, null, null, null, '', '', '', '', '', '', 0, 0, 0, null, null, null from #d2
update idm set ngay_ct = b.ngay_ct, so_ct = b.so_ct, ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs, user_id0 = @user, c$ = b.c$, m$ = b.m$, d$ = b.d$ from idm a join #i2 b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec end end
